title: Fix gpclub.vn homepage freeze
description: Fix gpclub.vn homepage freeze by lazy-loading public engagement widgets, deduplicating catalog fetches with React Query, deferring chat data until open, and limiting popup queries
close_reason: Completed homepage freeze remediation: lazy-loaded public engagement widgets, deduplicated catalog products with React Query, deferred Gippy chat data until open, limited popup query, verified lint/build/runtime smoke, and completed review with no findings.

comments.author: PC
comments.text: Created prd.md with 5 tasks, 7 success criteria, 5 primary affected app files. Generated prd.json and progress.txt. Claimed bead and created branch fix/gpclub_final-08v-homepage-freeze.

title: Progressive page shell loading
description: Implement shared skeleton components for public loading: keep static UI visible immediately, render skeletons for dynamic data while loading, and avoid fallback/fake dynamic data for products, catalogs, events, B2B images, contact settings, and FAQs.

title: Rich editor + HTML output + sanitize render
description: Replace the raw HTML product detail textarea with a rich editor for non-HTML-savvy admins, keep output as HTML, and sanitize product detail rendering on public pages.
